THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: --JUDGMENT ON SPECIAL VERDICT-- WHEREFORE, IT IS HEREBY ORDERED, ADJUDGED, AND DECREED THAT DEFENDANT WILLIAM LUC IS ENTITLED TO A DEFENSE VERDICT AGAINST THE PLAINTIFF SHUN MING LI AND THAT SAID PLAINTIFF SHUN MING LI RECOVER NO DAMAGES IN THIS CASE. DEFENDANT HENRY LUC (INCORRECTLY SUED AS HENERY LUC) WAS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE BY PLAINFIFF FROM THE CLAIM PRIOR TO THE JURY'S VERDICT. DEFENDANTS WILLIAM LUC AND HENRY LUC ARE THE PREVAILING PARTIES AND ENTITLED TO ALL COSTS AS PERMITTED BY LAW. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
